[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101101101 6
1 110111001 6
2 101100111 6
3 010111100 5
4 000110110 4
5 001101001 4
6 110001000 3
7 100011001 4

01 10 101100111 6 match 2
12 21 010111100 5 match 3
23 32 000110110 4 match 4
34 43 001101001 4 match 5
45 54 110001000 3 match 6
56 65 100011001 4 match 7
67 76 111000001 4
70 07 011010100 4

13 31 010001010 3
